overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime driving through a futuristic neon-lit urban highway. The player inspects the car interior briefly before continuing through traffic, entering a tunnel, and emerging onto winding coastal roads with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: driving on multi-lane highway through futuristic city, following traffic flow

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying CYBERLIFE text with blue-green graphics
tall illuminated buildings with glass facades and neon accents
yellow-orange illuminated safety barriers along the road edges
futuristic car dashboard with red digital displays and textured surface
red-rimmed steering wheel with metallic accents

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated urban highway at night through a cyberpunk cityscape. Neon billboards and futuristic skyscrapers line the right side while the vehicle follows a yellow taxi ahead. The dashboard and steering wheel are prominently visible in the foreground.

events.description: camera pans right to inspect passenger side and back seat area

agents.ego_description: looking around the car interior, checking passenger seat and rear seating area

entered.detail: tan leather passenger seat with visible stitching and headrest
rear passenger seating area with visible items on the seat
interior roof lining of the vehicle
passenger side window showing blurred city lights outside

segments.scene_description: The camera pans away from the windshield to inspect the vehicle interior, showing the tan leather passenger seat, rear seating area, and side windows. The exterior cityscape is no longer visible as the view focuses on the car's cabin details.

events.description: brief exterior camera angle shows white sedan in adjacent lane before returning to interior view

agents.ego_description: driving in traffic, glancing left at side mirror and adjacent vehicles, approaching tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel in the left lane, briefly viewed from exterior angle

entered.detail: driver's side rearview mirror reflecting traffic behind
dark tunnel opening with concrete frame approaching in the distance
highway signage indicating directions and exits

segments.scene_description: Resuming forward driving on the highway with moderate traffic. The driver glances at the side mirror showing adjacent vehicles including a white sedan. The tunnel entrance becomes visible in the distance as the vehicle continues through the neon-lit urban environment.

events.description: vehicle enters concrete tunnel with artificial overhead lighting
vehicle approaches and exits tunnel into open air

agents.ego_description: driving through the tunnel maintaining speed, following the vehicle ahead

entered.detail: smooth concrete tunnel walls with yellow lane markings at base
linear overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a well-lit concrete tunnel, transitioning from the open highway to an enclosed space. Smooth concrete walls flank both sides with overhead fluorescent lighting. The tunnel exit becomes visible ahead as the vehicle continues through the short passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal road with palm trees and hills

events.description: vehicle overtakes red sports car on the right side of the winding road

agents.ego_description: navigating winding road, overtaking a red sports car on the right, surrounded by palm trees and hills

notable_agents.action: red sports car being overtaken on the winding coastal road

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the roadside against the hillside
yellow safety barriers along the curves of the winding road
rocky and vegetated terrain rising alongside the road
curving asphalt road with double yellow lines marking the center

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel onto a winding coastal road surrounded by hills and palm trees. The vehicle overtakes a red sports car on the right while navigating the curves. Yellow guardrails line the road edges as streetlights illuminate the path through the semi-rural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that transitions from a neon-drenched cyberpunk metropolis into a serene, winding coastal landscape. It begins on an elevated urban highway, following a yellow taxi past towering skyscrapers and glowing billboards with the car's dashboard visible in the foreground. The camera briefly pans away from the windshield to inspect the tan leather interior and rear seating of the cabin before returning to the road to navigate through traffic and glance at the side mirror. The scene then shifts as the vehicle enters a well-lit concrete tunnel, moving from the open city air into an enclosed space defined by fluorescent overhead lighting. Finally, the camera emerges from the tunnel onto a curving coastal road, overtaking a red sports car amidst palm trees and yellow guardrails under the glow of streetlights.
